title: Phase D: extract Figure + 10 block renderers + renderBlock to src/components/(blocks/)
action: Move-only extraction of the block renderers and Figure out of src/App.jsx into src/components/ (per D4). Steps: (1) Create src/components/Figure.jsx exporting `Figure` AND its private helper `triLayout` (defined just above Figure, used only inside Figure at the geometry case). Add the imports Figure references (grep its body): geometry { P, arc, RAD } from '../lib/geometry.js' as used, { C } from '../lib/colors.js', any lucide icons, React hooks if used. (2) Create one file per block under src/components/blocks/ (TextBlock, CalculatorBlock, RevealBlock, WhyBlock, RealLifeBlock, NumberLineBlock, FillInBlock, QuizBlock, DecimalBlock, AnglesBlock), each exporting its component with the EXACT current body. For EACH block, add only the imports it actually references — resolve them by reading the block body and by the editor's unused/undefined diagnostics. Likely deps per block, import as referenced: React hooks { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; { C } from '../../lib/colors.js'; number helpers { parseNum, decToFrac, decimalInfo, gcd } from '../../lib/num.js'; geometry { P, arc, RAD } from '../../lib/geometry.js'; styles { inputBox, btnPrimary, btnGhost } from '../../lib/styles.js'; { Frac } from '../Frac.jsx'; { RichText, richToText } from '../RichText.jsx'; { NumberLine } from '../NumberLine.jsx'; { Card } from '../ui/Card.jsx'; { Pill } from '../ui/Pill.jsx'; { HowTo } from '../ui/HowTo.jsx'; { Figure } from '../Figure.jsx'; and named lucide icons the block uses. `award` is a PROP passed in, never imported. (3) Create src/components/blocks/renderBlock.jsx exporting `renderBlock(s, award)` — the exact switch statement — importing all 10 block components. (4) In src/App.jsx: DELETE the definitions of triLayout, Figure, all 10 blocks, and renderBlock; add `import { renderBlock } from './components/blocks/renderBlock.jsx'` (App.jsx calls renderBlock only, not the blocks directly). Then trim App.jsx's now-unused imports (react hooks, lucide names, lib helpers, Frac/RichText/etc.) that were used ONLY by the moved code — verify each removal against diagnostics/grep; keep every name App.jsx's remaining shell code still uses. Do NOT change behavior, lesson content (D2), or static/ (D1). Do NOT move lesson data BAI_* (Phase E). The smoke net + build are the regression gate.

truths: src/components/blocks/ has one file per block (10) each exporting its component, plus renderBlock.jsx exporting renderBlock
src/App.jsx imports renderBlock and no longer defines any block/Figure/renderBlock; no duplicate definitions remain
npx vitest run stays green (all 15 lessons, >=100 stations, all 10 block types render) and npm run build stays clean
imports acyclic: blocks import lib/*, shared components, Figure, lucide; renderBlock imports blocks; no block imports App.jsx

artifacts.substantive: exports Figure + triLayout; imports geometry/colors/lucide as used
exports renderBlock(s, award) switch importing all 10 blocks; no TODO
exports QuizBlock with exact body and resolved imports (uses Figure, RichText, styles)

key_links: blocks that render figures import Figure from ../Figure.jsx
prohibitions: Do NOT change observable behavior or output
Do NOT alter lesson content (D2) or touch static/ (D1)
Do NOT move lesson data BAI_1..15 (Phase E) or slim the App shell (Phase F)
award must remain a prop, never an import

verify: npx vitest run && npm run build

trace.verify_output: vitest: 1 passed (15 lessons, all 10 block types render). build: clean, bundle 296.25 kB == baseline. App.jsx 2232->1259 lines; Figure+10 blocks+renderBlock extracted to src/components/(blocks/); App imports only renderBlock. Dead imports (Frac,RichText,NumberLine,Card,HowTo,num,geometry) trimmed by orchestrator after worker. award stays a prop; no block imports App.jsx.
trace.verify_command: npx vitest run && npm run build
